description: SFX manifest — maps sound keys to ElevenLabs-generated OGG files. Falls back to procedural if file missing.

menu_move.prompt: Very short soft electronic pip, gentle digital cursor tick like scrolling through a retro game menu, quiet and clean

menu_select.prompt: Bright decisive confirmation chime, quick two-note ascending ping like a SNES menu confirm, clean digital reward ding

menu_cancel.prompt: Quick low digital buzz rejection, short descending cancel tone like backing out of a SNES menu, snappy negative blip

menu_expand.prompt: Crisp window opening whoosh, quick snappy swoosh like a SNES submenu expanding, short airy pop

menu_open.prompt: Satisfying menu open chime, warm ascending three-note jingle like opening the SNES pause menu, inviting and crisp

advance_queue.prompt: Single outdoor gunshot with long reverberating echo, pitched down 25% for deep bass, distant rifle fired in mountains

advance_undo.prompt: Gun slide racking backward, mechanical metal slide retraction, weapon uncocking click-clack

defer.prompt: Shield being planted on stone ground, solid metal clunk of a guard bracing, firm defensive stance thud

player_turn.prompt: Quick bright marimba two-note ping, warm wooden mallet on resonant bar, clean melodic notification

autobattle_on.prompt: Heavy industrial lever being pulled, solid mechanical clunk engaging with a confident ka-chunk, machine activated

autobattle_off.prompt: Heavy switch thrown to off position, solid mechanical disengagement clunk, power-down lever release

autobattle_open.prompt: Old computer terminal booting up, warm CRT monitor turning on with an electronic hum, retro tech startup

autobattle_close.prompt: CRT monitor powering off, electronic whine descending to silence, retro computer shutdown

chest_open.prompt: Wooden treasure chest lid creaking open with rusty hinges, satisfying latch clunk then magical shimmer of treasure revealed, classic RPG chest

save_crystal_near.prompt: Soft magical crystal hum beginning, gentle ethereal resonance like approaching a glowing gem, quiet mystical proximity chime

save_crystal_activate.prompt: Crystal activating with a bright ascending chime cascade, magical save point resonating with pure tones, satisfying confirmation sparkle reaching a clear peak note

door_open.prompt: Heavy wooden door creaking open, old iron hinges groaning, medieval dungeon door swinging with a deep resonant creak

door_close.prompt: Heavy wooden door shutting firmly, solid thud of thick oak closing with a deep latch click, dungeon door sealing

tier_zoom_out.prompt: Quick cinematic zoom out whoosh, camera pulling back smoothly, confident transition sweep

tier_zoom_in.prompt: Quick cinematic zoom in whoosh, camera pushing forward smoothly, confident transition sweep

speed_change.prompt: Ratchet clicking one notch forward, mechanical gear tooth engaging, satisfying single click of a dial turning

attack_hit.prompt: Short dull punch landing on flesh, soft meaty thud with zero metallic tone, like a fist hitting a sandbag, completely dry muffled low frequency thump, no ring no kling no brightness

attack_hit_v2.prompt: Quick heavy body blow, deep gut punch impact with a low bass thump, like a heavyweight boxer landing a body shot on padding, zero brightness zero ring, dry muffled

attack_hit_v3.prompt: Short blunt weapon hitting thick leather armor, dull padded smack with low frequency weight, like a club on a heavy bag, no metallic overtones, completely muted thud

attack_miss.prompt: Sword swinging through empty air, quick blade whoosh cutting nothing, clean miss

critical_hit.prompt: Explosive critical strike with deep bass slam and a sharp crack, bone-crunching power hit with reverb, devastating blow

damage_taken.prompt: Short dull body hit, quick muffled thud like a boxing glove on a heavy bag, no ring no shimmer, dry impact

damage_taken_v2.prompt: Quick shoulder check body slam, padded tackle impact with a low grunt of displaced air, dull cushioned thump, no brightness

damage_taken_v3.prompt: Short slap on thick fabric, quick flat palm hit on a leather jacket, dry muffled smack with zero metallic tone, low frequency

enemy_death.prompt: Monster dissolving into particles, crackling disintegration with a descending whoosh, defeated enemy vanishing

victory_stinger.prompt: Quick triumphant hit, short celebratory brass stab with a bright chime accent, victorious exclamation point sound, punchy rewarding impact with ascending sparkle tail

footstep_grass.prompt: Single soft footstep on grass, quiet shoe on lawn, gentle earthy step

footstep_grass_v2.prompt: Single footstep crunching dry grass, quiet boot on meadow, soft natural step

footstep_grass_v3.prompt: Single footstep on dewy grass, quiet shoe pressing wet lawn, muffled green step

footstep_stone.prompt: Single boot step on stone floor, hard sole on cobblestone, quick dry tap on rock surface

footstep_stone_v2.prompt: Single footstep on marble floor, hard heel click on polished stone, crisp indoor step

footstep_stone_v3.prompt: Single boot on gravel path, crunchy stone step, small rocks shifting under foot

footstep_sand.prompt: Single footstep in soft sand, quiet shoe sinking into dry beach sand, muffled granular step

footstep_sand_v2.prompt: Single boot step in desert sand, dry shifting grains under foot, soft arid step

footstep_sand_v3.prompt: Single footstep on sandy dirt path, dry earth and loose sand underfoot, quiet dusty step

footstep_snow.prompt: Single footstep crunching fresh snow, quiet boot compressing powder, crisp cold winter step

footstep_snow_v2.prompt: Single boot step in deep snow, muffled crunch of packed ice crystals, heavy winter footfall

footstep_snow_v3.prompt: Single light step on icy snow crust, thin crackle of frozen surface breaking, delicate winter step

footstep_metal.prompt: Single boot step on metal grate, industrial steel floor clang, short hollow metallic footfall

footstep_metal_v2.prompt: Single step on metal catwalk, light ringing steel platform footstep, factory floor tap

footstep_metal_v3.prompt: Single heavy boot on iron plate, deep dull metallic thud, industrial walkway step

footstep_wood.prompt: Single footstep on wooden floorboard, warm hollow wood tap, tavern floor step

footstep_wood_v2.prompt: Single step on creaky wooden plank, old floorboard groaning softly, rustic cabin step

footstep_wood_v3.prompt: Single boot on wooden deck, solid timber thump, ship deck or bridge footstep

weather_rain.prompt: Gentle steady rain falling on stone and leaves, soft patter of raindrops on a medieval village, calming natural rainfall ambience, no thunder

weather_sunny.prompt: Peaceful suburban afternoon ambience, gentle breeze through trees, distant birds chirping softly, warm sunny day in a quiet neighborhood, crickets and light wind

weather_steam.prompt: Steampunk city ambience, distant steam vents hissing, brass gears turning slowly, occasional pipe whistle, Victorian industrial backdrop with amber fog atmosphere

weather_smog.prompt: Heavy industrial ambience, deep machinery rumble, distant factory clanking, low droning ventilation, oppressive smog atmosphere with metallic echoes

weather_glitch.prompt: Digital void ambience, low electronic hum with occasional data crackle, quiet circuit board buzz, sparse glitchy artifacts in a vast empty digital space

level_up.prompt: Triumphant ascending chime cascade, bright crystalline notes climbing upward like a classic RPG level up jingle, magical sparkle reaching a satisfying peak note

gold_pickup.prompt: Handful of gold coins clinking together, bright metallic jingling of treasure being collected, satisfying coin cascade into a pouch

exp_tick.prompt: Ultra short soft digital pip, tiny progress bar increment tick, minimal quiet blip like a meter filling up one notch

group_formation.prompt: Party uniting in formation, synchronized war cry with weapons clashing together, team power combining with a resonant harmonic chord, RPG party unite attack

formation_four_heroes.prompt: Four warriors striking as one, balanced sword slash and magic burst and shield bash and arrow combined into a single powerful harmonious impact

formation_arcane_tempest.prompt: Massive magical storm erupting, swirling arcane energy tornado with multiple spell elements colliding, overwhelming magical vortex explosion

formation_blade_storm.prompt: Rapid flurry of blade strikes, dozens of sword slashes in quick succession like a blender of steel, metallic whirlwind of cutting edges

formation_iron_wall.prompt: Massive shields slamming together into formation, deep resonant metal wall impact, fortress defense activating with a heavy bass shockwave

formation_shadow_strike.prompt: Silent deadly assassination strike, quick shadow whoosh into a precise lethal impact, ninja vanish and reappear with a sharp finishing blow

formation_chaos_theory.prompt: Slot machine spinning with chaotic energy, random magical effects firing wildly, dice rolling mixed with explosions and sparkles, unpredictable gamble sound

boss_defeat_stinger.prompt: Epic triumphant orchestral explosion, massive brass fanfare with cymbal crash and deep bass resolve, victorious final blow shockwave dissolving into golden sparkles

boss_intro_stinger.prompt: Dramatic orchestral hit with deep timpani slam, ominous brass stab announcing danger, dark foreboding impact like a boss appearing in an RPG, reverberating doom chord

group_all_out.prompt: Massive coordinated strike, multiple heavy impacts landing simultaneously like a stampede hitting a wall, thunderous collective body blow with deep bass shockwave, earthquake punch

group_combo_magic.prompt: Multiple magical elements fusing together, fire ice and lightning converging into one blast, crystalline energy collision with a deep resonant boom, elemental fusion explosion

group_limit_break.prompt: Ultimate power unleashed, ascending energy buildup into a devastating explosion, reality-warping shockwave with deep bass rumble and bright crystalline shatter at the peak

heal.prompt: Gentle wind chimes in a warm breeze, tinkling restoration with a rising shimmer, soothing healing sound

heal_v2.prompt: Warm golden light materializing, soft ascending harp glissando with crystalline sparkles, gentle magical restoration

heal_v3.prompt: Holy water splash with bell chime, purifying droplets with a soft resonant tone, cleansing white magic wash

buff.prompt: Quick magical power-up whoosh with rising pitch, energizing upward sweep of warm synth, stat boost activated

buff_v2.prompt: Sharp ascending power chord, quick energizing burst with bright harmonics, magical shield activating with a confident snap

buff_v3.prompt: Rapid upward chime sequence like collecting power stars, bright encouraging ascending notes, RPG stat boost jingle

debuff.prompt: Sad descending pitch drop, deflating rubber balloon losing air, comical weakening spiral downward

debuff_v2.prompt: Dark descending warble, ominous power drain with a low rumbling fade, curse taking hold with a hollow echo

debuff_v3.prompt: Quick dissonant chord dissolving downward, shattering glass falling into a pit, stat reduction with sharp negative tone

victory.prompt: Triumphant brass fanfare melody, classic RPG victory jingle, celebratory horns and chimes, joyful short tune

defeat.prompt: Sad piano descending, somber game over melody, melancholic and fading to silence

status_poison.prompt: Toxic bubbling liquid, sickly gurgling potion, venomous dripping with a wet squelch

status_sleep.prompt: Music box winding down, sleepy descending lullaby notes, drowsy tinkling fading out slowly

status_confuse.prompt: Cartoon dizzy birds circling head, wobbly spiraling sound, comical disorientation, spinning stars

status_paralyze.prompt: Electric taser zap followed by frozen stillness, sharp static crackle then silence, stunning shock

phase_select.prompt: Clear bell ding, single clean notification chime, present and noticeable, like a service bell tap

phase_execute.prompt: Firm drum hit, single confident snare strike signaling go-time, decisive and authoritative

ability_fire.prompt: Roaring campfire erupting, warm crackling flames whooshing upward, deep orange fire with wood pops and snaps, cozy but powerful

ability_fire_v2.prompt: Explosive fireball detonation, quick burst of intense flame with a deep bass boom, magical fire igniting in a flash

ability_fire_v3.prompt: Dragon breath flame jet, sustained roaring fire stream with crackling embers trailing off, fierce heat wave

ability_ice.prompt: Cracking frozen lake, sharp crystalline ice forming rapidly, cold brittle snapping with frosty wind howl, winter blizzard

ability_ice_v2.prompt: Ice lance shattering on impact, sharp crystalline explosion of frozen shards scattering, brittle glass-like breaking with cold reverb

ability_ice_v3.prompt: Freezing spell encasing target, rapid frost spreading with crackling crystallization, deep cold whoosh as ice solidifies

ability_lightning.prompt: Close thunderclap with electric buzzing aftermath, raw thunder strike with static discharge crackling, stormy atmospheric

ability_lightning_v2.prompt: Sharp electric bolt striking ground, quick bright zap with sizzling aftermath, concentrated lightning discharge with ozone crackle

ability_lightning_v3.prompt: Chain lightning arcing between targets, rapid succession of electrical snaps and pops, crackling energy bouncing with fading static

ability_holy.prompt: Cathedral pipe organ chord with heavenly choir voices, sacred resonant golden light, deep reverberant church acoustics, divine

ability_dark.prompt: Deep underground rumble with whispering ghostly voices, dark cavern echoing void, eerie low vibration with distant wailing

ability_physical.prompt: Quick clean sword unsheathing and slicing through air, sharp steel ring fading, precise blade technique

ability_heal.prompt: Gentle rain on leaves with harp notes, nature healing sounds, birdsong and dewdrops, peaceful restoration

ability_heal_v2.prompt: Soft choir voices humming a soothing note, angelic restoration with warm reverb, divine healing magic with gentle bells

ability_heal_v3.prompt: Bubbling spring water with gentle flute melody, fresh brook sounds with magical sparkles, nature cure spell

w2_ability_fire.prompt: Gas stove burner igniting with a whoosh, kitchen flame flaring up, domestic fire sound, suburban cooking gone wrong

w2_ability_ice.prompt: Garden sprinkler system bursting on, pressurized water spray freezing in air, suburban lawn irrigation gone icy

w2_ability_lightning.prompt: Leaf blower revving to maximum power, aggressive electric motor whine with gusting wind, suburban yard tool weaponized

w2_ability_holy.prompt: Suburban church bell ringing clearly, neighborhood Sunday morning bell chime, wholesome community sound with warmth

w2_ability_dark.prompt: Old basement door creaking open, dark cellar moaning with distant furnace rumble, suburban house with something wrong underneath

w2_ability_heal.prompt: Garden hose spraying gently with backyard wind chimes tinkling, pleasant suburban afternoon, peaceful neighborhood sounds

w2_ability_physical.prompt: Screen door slamming shut, satisfying suburban door bang, quick domestic impact

w3_ability_fire.prompt: Industrial furnace blast door opening, roaring metal forge fire with bellows pumping, steampunk smelter eruption

w3_ability_ice.prompt: High pressure steam valve releasing, sharp hissing jet of freezing steam, industrial coolant venting with pipe rattle

w3_ability_lightning.prompt: Tesla coil arcing with buzzing electricity, steampunk generator spark discharge, crackling copper coil energy

w3_ability_holy.prompt: Grand clocktower bell chiming, ornate brass bell with mechanical hammer strike, steampunk cathedral clock

w3_ability_dark.prompt: Heavy machinery grinding to a halt, gears seizing with metallic screeching, broken clockwork failing ominously

w3_ability_heal.prompt: Gentle steam release with ticking clockwork music box, warm brass pipes humming, steampunk healing apparatus

w3_ability_physical.prompt: Pneumatic piston firing, compressed air cylinder punching, steampunk mechanical arm striking with a hiss

w6_ability_fire.prompt: Pure rising tone — concept of heat

w6_ability_ice.prompt: Pure descending tone — concept of cold

w6_ability_lightning.prompt: Sharp pure tone spike — concept of sudden energy

w6_ability_holy.prompt: Harmonic chord resolving to unity — abstract truth

w6_ability_dark.prompt: Low tone fading to silence — concept of absence

w6_ability_heal.prompt: Two tones converging to unison — becoming whole

w6_ability_physical.prompt: Single percussive sine ping — concept of force

screen_shake.prompt: Deep rumbling earthquake tremor, ground shaking impact with low bass vibration, dramatic cinematic rumble

screen_flash.prompt: Sharp thunder crack with bright flash impact, sudden lightning strike, dramatic cinematic hit

letterbox_in.prompt: Smooth cinematic curtain closing whoosh, subtle film projector engaging, quiet dramatic transition in

letterbox_out.prompt: Smooth cinematic curtain opening whoosh, subtle film projector disengaging, quiet dramatic transition out

cave_whispers.prompt: Eerie cave whispers echoing in darkness, ghostly murmuring voices in a deep cavern, unsettling ambient wind through stone tunnels

armor_clank.prompt: Medieval plate armor clanking together, metal gauntlet striking breastplate in salute, military honor gesture

sword_draw_heavy.prompt: Heavy two-handed greatsword being drawn from scabbard, long slow steel scraping against leather, weighty and deliberate unsheathe

sword_on_stone.prompt: Heavy sword being placed point-down on stone floor, metallic ring echoing in a hall, solemn weapon resting, armor settling

portal_activate.prompt: Magical portal opening with swirling energy hum, reality warping distortion building to a resonant tone, interdimensional gateway powering up

reality_glitch.prompt: Reality flickering and glitching, digital static mixed with broken record skipping, world tearing momentarily, unsettling distortion

lute_strum.prompt: Quick medieval lute chord strum, bright acoustic string pluck, bard playing a confident flourish, warm wooden instrument

goblin_fanfare.prompt: Comical goblin merchant entrance fanfare, silly kazoo and off-key trumpet, goofy carnival jingle, mischievous and funny

rat_king_squeak.prompt: Dramatic oversized rat squeaking menacingly, deep pitched rodent squeal building to a threatening screech, comically intimidating boss entrance
